sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 1992. Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 1992. Short title
•

(1) On the authority of the warrant issued by the President, Appropria­
there may be expended from the general revenues of the Republic tion
moneys, not exceeding sevent-four thousand two hundred and
thirty-four million seven hundred and fifteen thousand three hun­
dred and twenty kwacha as may be required for the services of the
Republic during the financial year ending 31st December, 1992.
(2) The moneys referred to in sub:ection (1) shall be appropri­
ated to the services of the Republic specified in the second column
of the Schedule in amounts not exceeding the amounts indicated in
the third column of that Schedule.
(3) On the written authority of the Permanent Secretary, Minis­
try of Finance, the amounts shown in the sub-heads of the estimates
may be varied provided that:
(i) the amounts appropriated to each Head shall not thereby be
altered; and
(ii) the amounts shown under Head 20/01 or 21/01 shall
not be varied.
Single copies of this Act may� obtainedf rom the Gover-nl Prinler,
P.O. Box 30136, 10100 Lusaka. Price K6.00.
